Blue-Eyes Toon Ultimate Dragon._current:
"Blue-Eyes Toon Dragon" + 2 Toon monsters
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck/Extra Deck. Your Toon monsters can attack directly. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can add 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card by name, from your GY to your hand. If your Toon monster is attacked, during damage calculation: You can BANISH it until the end of the Damage Step.

Bramble Rose Dragon._current: 1 Plant Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners Each time your opponent activates a monster effect, inflict 600 damage to your opponent, and if you do, all monsters your opponent currently controls lose 600 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Bramble Rose Dragon" once per turn. During the Main Phase (QUICK EFFECT): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Black Rose Dragon" from your Extra Deck (this is treated as a Synchro Summon). You can BANISH this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Plant Tuner from your GY.
Bramble Rose Dragon.previous: 1 Plant Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters Each time your opponent activates a monster effect, inflict 600 damage to your opponent, and if you do, all monsters your opponent currently controls lose 600 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Bramble Rose Dragon" once per turn. During the Main Phase (QUICK EFFECT): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Black Rose Dragon" from your Extra Deck (this is treated as a Synchro Summon). You can BANISH this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Plant Tuner from your GY.

Kagetokage._current:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned by its own effect. Cannot be used as Synchro Material.
① When you Normal Summon a Level 4 monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.

Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned by its own effect.
① Cannot be used as Synchro Material.
When you Normal Summon a Level 4 monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.

Madolche Ticket._current:
HOPT | If another "Madolche" card(s) you control or in your GY is added to your hand or shuffled into your Main Deck by a card effect: SEARCH 1 "Madolche" monster.
If you control a Fairy "Madolche" monster, you can Special Summon the monster from your Deck in Attack Position instead of adding it to your hand.
Madolche Ticket.previous: HOPT | If another "Madolche" card(s) you control or in your GY is added to your hand or shuffled into your Main Deck by a card effect: SEARCH 1 "Madolche" monster. If you control a Fairy "Madolche" monster, you can Special Summon the monster from your Deck in Attack Position instead of adding it to your hand.

Magical Musket Mastermind Caspar._current:
2 monsters, including a LIGHT Fiend monster
① During either player's turn, you can activate "Magical Musket" Spell/Trap Cards from your hand.
② HOPT | If this card is Link Summoned: You can take 2 "Magical Musket" cards from your hand and/or Deck, including a monster, Special Summon 1 monster from it to your field, and Set the other to your opponent's field.

Magical Scientist._current:
Pay 1000 Life Points to Special Summon 1 level 6 or lower Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck in face-up Attack or Defense Position.
That Fusion Monster cannot attack your opponent's Life Points directly, and is returned to your Extra Deck at the end of the turn.
Magical Scientist.previous: Pay 1000 Life Points to Special Summon 1 level 6 or lower Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck in face-up Attack or Defense Position. That Fusion Monster cannot attack your opponent's Life Points directly, and is returned to your Extra Deck at the end of the turn.

Metamorphosis._current:
Tribute 1 monster.
Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck with the same Level as the Tributed monster.
Metamorphosis.previous: Tribute 1 monster. Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck with the same Level as the Tributed monster.

Pumpking the Great Ghost King._current: 2 Level 6 Zombie monsters ① While you control "Call of the Haunted", your opponent cannot target Zombie monsters you control with monster effects. ② HOPT | If this card is Special Summoned: You can SEARCH 1 "Call of the Haunted" or 1 card that mentions it. ③ HOPT | You can detach 1 material from this card, then target up to 2 cards on the field; BOUNCE them.

Rescue-ACE Arbitrator._current: 2+ FIRE monsters You can only Special Summon "Rescue-ACE Arbitrator(s)" once per turn. ① If this card is Link Summoned: You can SEARCH 1 "Rescue-ACE Hydrant" or "Rescue-ACE HQ" (from DECK or GY). ② If you activate a "Rescue-ACE" Quick-Play Spell Card or a "Rescue-ACE" Normal Trap Card (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card your opponent controls; DESTROY it. You can only use this effect of "Rescue-ACE Arbitrator" twice per turn.

Rex, Ride Fur Hire._current: ① HOPT | You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 monster "Fur Hire" from your hand, except "Rex, Ride Fur Hire", then Special Summon this card. ② If a card(s) is added from the Deck to your opponent's hand, except by a card effect "Fur Hire", and you control another monster "Fur Hire" (except during the Damage Step): You can DRAW 1 card.

Subspace Battle._current:
HOPT ACTIVATION
Apply the following effect, 3 times, in sequence.
● Each player reveals 1 monster from their Deck that does not have ? ATK. Add the monster with the higher ATK to the hand of the player that revealed it, also DESTROY the monster with the lower ATK and inflict 500 damage to the player that revealed it. If tied, shuffle those monsters into the Decks.
For the rest of this turn, neither player can activate the effects of monsters with any of their revealed monsters' names.

The Perfect Cartoon World._current: This card's name becomes "Toon World" while in the Field Zone. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can SEARCH 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card by name. You can only use this effect of "The Perfect Cartoon World" thrice per turn. If another card's effect activates, at the start of its resolution, you can BANISH 1 Toon monster you control until immediately after that effect resolves (each unique original monster name can only be banished once per turn, by you, by this effect of "The Perfect Cartoon World").

Trifortressops._current:
During either player's turn, if your opponent Summoned 3 or more monsters this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand.
If Summoned this way, it is unaffected by other cards' effects, but loses 500 DEF during each player's Standby Phase.
Trifortressops.previous: During either player's turn, if your opponent Summoned 3 or more monsters this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If Summoned this way, it is unaffected by other cards' effects, but loses 500 DEF during each player's Standby Phase.

Unchained Firelord of Yama._current: 2+ monsters, including an "Unchained Soul" monster During your End Phase: You can target up to 2 Fiend monsters in your GY that were destroyed this turn; Special Summon them, but for each one, as long as it remains face-up in your Monster Zone, you cannot Special Summon, except Fiend monsters. If this card on the field would be destroyed, you can DESTROY 1 other face-up card on either field instead. You can only use each effect of "Unchained Firelord of Yama" once per turn.

Witchcrafter Madame Rilliona._current: "Witchcrafter Madame Verre" + 2 Spellcaster monsters If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can Special Summon up to 3 Level 7 or lower "Witchcrafter" monsters with different Attributes from your hand and/or Deck, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters. During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can reveal 1 Spell in your hand; Special Summon this card in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Madame Rilliona" once per turn.

Witchcrafter Walpurgis._current: During your Main Phase: You can SEARCH 1 "Witchcrafter" monster then DISCARD 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Witchcrafter Walpurgis" once per turn. During your turn, if a "Witchcrafter" monster you control would DISCARD to activate an effect, you can send 1 "Witchcrafter" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY instead, except "Witchcrafter Walpurgis".

Cannot be used as Synchro Material, except for the Synchro Summon of an "X-Saber" monster.
① When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "X-Saber" monster from your hand.
